title: Cobblemon : Bright & Gloomy Würm
description: A Modpack aiming to create the most complete, optimized, and fun Cobblemon experience.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/329843a6fd9bb737ba110fea286f850742ef9653.png)
This modpack aims to give you the absolute best and most complete Cobblemon experience, with almost all the feature of the "Classic Pokémon game", while also being optimized and with few minecraft stuff, this way it will prevent bad performance while having everything you could hope for in a Cobblemon Aventure.

**Basicaly, here is a list of what you can expect in this mod :**

<details>
<summary>Features</summary>

- **All the Pokémon** from the pokédex
- **Every combat features** like _being able to see move power during combat, or even méga évolution, gigamax, etc..._
- **Trainer and gym leader**, all thanks to _RTC Mod_
- **beginning level of 5** for your adventure just like in real Pokémon game
- **Many structure** to explore and a **big world generation** that await you ! (with _Yung's structure mods; pokemon legendary structure;..._)
- **A lot of feature from the orginal game** like _breeding_ and or _téra raid_ !
- **A lot of QOL !!!** (_Xaero's minimap; NEI; Sophisticated Backpack; Etc..._)
- **Peer to Peer multiplayer** with _Essential_
- **No Vanilla Mobs** no matter the difficulty !
- And a **lot of Optimisation** mods installed to make sure that a maximum of player can run it !


</details>


If you got any mod to recommend or any form of recommendation to give i'll be more then happy to hear it ! (To contact me, here is my Discord username : zodlort)


have a wonderfull day and experience trainer !
